title: Ethereum
html: Stub. Decentralized blockchain-based global supercomputer launched 2015; foundation for dApps, smart contracts, and DAOs. Saved primer in 2022 03 08 web3 starter pack. Compare with the lighter-weight Polygon/Matic that the FWEB3 class workshop (2023 06 29 how to get set up for wallet work day) actually defaults to.

related.label: How to get set up for wallet work day (FWEB3 class primer)
Web3 Starter Pack (saved primer by Jay Drain Jr.)
